{{R|Tri-Boomerang||2}} is an {{QueryLink|Relics|rarity:Ancient|Ancient|2}} {{2|Relic}}.

== Obtaining Tri-Boomerang ==
At the start of {{2|Acts#Act 3|Act 3}}, can be offered by {{KW|Tanx||2}}.

== Interactions ==
*{{R|Miniature Cannon||2}} and {{R|Mystic Lighter||2}} activates after the effects of {{KW|Instinct||2}}.
